---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Playarr
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Drew-Chase

---

## Problem or Motivation

_Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the motivation behind this request. Ex: "I'm always frustrated when..."_


## Proposed Solution

_A clear description of what you'd like to happen._


## Alternative Solutions

_Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered._


## Component

_Which part of Playarr does this relate to? Check all that apply._

- [ ] **Plex Integration** — Libraries, metadata, continue watching, on deck, recently added
- [ ] **Video Player** — HLS.js playback, subtitles, audio tracks, keyboard shortcuts
- [ ] **Discovery** — TMDB trending, upcoming, recently released content
- [ ] **Download Management** — SABnzbd, NZBGet, qBittorrent, Transmission
- [ ] **Watch Party** — WebSocket sync, rooms, play/pause/seek, episode queues
- [ ] **Sonarr / Radarr** — TV series or movie management
- [ ] **Authentication** — Plex PIN auth, user sessions, access control
- [ ] **Settings / Configuration** — config.toml, settings UI
- [ ] **API (Backend)** — New or modified Actix-web endpoints
- [ ] **UI (Frontend)** — React components, layout, styling, responsiveness
- [ ] **New Integration** — _(please specify the service below)_
- [ ] **Other** — _(please describe)_


## New Integration Details

_If requesting a new service integration, fill out this section. Otherwise, skip it._

| Detail            | Value                          |
|-------------------|--------------------------------|
| Service Name      |                                |
| Service Type      | Media Server / PVR / Download Client / Metadata Provider / Other |
| Has Public API?   | Yes / No / Unknown             |
| API Documentation |                                |


## Use Case

_Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful._

**Example workflow:**
1. User opens Playarr and navigates to '...'
2. User clicks '...'
3. The new feature does '...'
4. User sees '...'


## Mockups / References

_If applicable, add sketches, mockups, screenshots from other apps, or links to similar implementations that illustrate the idea._


## Scope & Impact

**Who benefits from this feature?**
- [ ] All users
- [ ] Users with specific integrations (specify: _______)
- [ ] Power users / self-hosting enthusiasts
- [ ] Developers / API consumers

**Estimated complexity:**
- [ ] **Small** — Minor UI tweak or config option
- [ ] **Medium** — New component or moderate backend work
- [ ] **Large** — New integration, major feature, or architectural change

**Would you be willing to help implement this?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with design / mockups
- [ ] Not at this time


## Additional Context

_Add any other context, links, or references about the feature request here._
